---
title: 'Dear Her, 4/30/2020 also'
date: '2020-05-01T06:17:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1355537828132769447'
blogger_filename: '/2020/04/dear-her-4302020-also.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Dear Her'
---

<div>Dear Her,</div><div><br></div><div>Can I admit, I'm terrified to meet you?</div><div><br></div><div>So many what ifs... My friend Jen says, it'll be easy.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>We shall see.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588313833352024-0-34f43ce2a6bf.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588313833352024-0-34f43ce2a6bf.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588313829732158-1-ba8297586bba.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588313829732158-1-ba8297586bba.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588313944207812-0-4d1fa7b4d644.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0"   src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588313944207812-0-4d1fa7b4d644.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588313940341352-1-ca478c0656ab.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0"   src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588313940341352-1-ca478c0656ab.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><br></div>
